---
name: Bug report
about: Report an issue or unexpected behavior in WikiForms to help us improve
title: Bug report of [bug_name]
labels: bug, help wanted
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the issue is in WikiForms.

## Context
- **Wikipedia Project/Wiki**: (e.g., bn.wikipedia.org, en.wikipedia.org)
- **Wikimedia Username**: (Optional, e.g., User:Example)
- **Target Page Title**: (The page/article where the form or tool failed, e.g., "ঢাকা")

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open WikiForms / Go to '...'
2. Select form or action '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error message or behavior

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen (e.g., "The edit should have been published to the page", "The form should generate wikitext correctly").

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (e.g., "Page stuck on loading", "API Error 403", "Wikitext generated incorrectly").

## Screenshots / Error Logs
- **Screenshots**: If applicable, add screenshots to explain the issue.
- **Console Errors**: (If possible, open inspect element -> Console and paste any red error logs here)

## System Information
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Android, iOS]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- **Browser Extensions**: [e.g. Any active Wikipedia scripts or adblockers?]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem, WikiForms template versions, or edge cases here.
